steps.title: Use the prediction clue
steps.content: The example says few economists would have predicted the Beanie Babies price surge. That clue points to difficulty anticipating future market behavior.

steps.title: Choose the prediction word
steps.content: "Forecast" means predict future trends, which fits the example. B means trade, C means observe, and D means stay away from; none explains why the market surprised economists. The answer is A.
